content.en:
The sea of dimensions is boundless, and there are no known how many powerful heaven and earth there are, and they are also the pinnacle of the ninth realm that has mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move, they can't deduce any information about Ye Tian, that is, they can't trace it at all.

In desperation, they could only explore the entire Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth to see if there were any other outsiders.

As a result, there was really an unlucky outsider who was found out and killed.

......

Tianwei Pavilion.

Chen Jingying, Baili Qingye and the others finally learned about the Yaori Heavenly Sect, a new ultimate master broke through the Yaori Heavenly Sect, snatched the treasure house and countless resources of the Yaori Heavenly Sect, and then escaped from the Shenwei Heaven and Earth.

This matter can't be hidden at all, and many ultimate powerhouses have seen it.

The top level of Tianwei Pavilion is not stupid, and after a little calculation, they know that the ultimate master who ransacked the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect is their pavilion master, Yang Wu.

Why did Yang Wu do this, they didn't dare to investigate, they could only assume that this matter did not exist.

Of course, some high-level people speculated that Yang Wu was not a Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and it was very likely that he had something to do with an existence outside the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

After all, their pavilion master is growing too fast, and there is no bottleneck in the whole process, which is too abnormal.

Anyway, after Yang Wu left, Tianwei Pavilion, under the leadership of Chen Jingying and other high-level Tianwei Pavilion leaders, gradually withdrew from the Divine Dimension Domain.

After all, with their strength, they can't occupy the 363 territory of the Divine Dimension Domain now, so it's better to withdraw.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

Ye Tian now needed to return to the multidimensional territory by himself, and he needed to cross a long distance halfway.

Although he had obtained a lot of information and maps of the Dimensional Sea from the Void Heaven Palace, there was still a risk of returning.

To do this, he had a replica body open the way in front of him.

There are countless powerhouses in the Sea of Dimensions, but he has mastered two ultimate dimensional killing moves, and his strength is not weak, unless he is unlucky, the possibility of encountering danger just by hurrying back is not too high.

this day.

Ye Tian saw a behemoth in the Dimension Sea, the other party's body was extremely powerful, and he swallowed a large amount of Dimension Sea energy in his breath.

Ye Tian even felt the breath of the ultimate body from his body.

"It's the ultimate creature!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

There are many Ultimate Creatures in the Sea of Dimensions, and they have powerful Ultimate Bloodlines, even the peak powerhouses of the Ninth Realm who have mastered the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move, it is difficult to help them.

Of course, there aren't many of these ultimate creatures.

Ye Tian approached, and the copying talent enveloped the other party, (CIDD) sensed the opponent's ultimate talent.

【Ultimate Talent: Flesh】

Ye Tian wanted to copy the other party's ultimate physical talent, but found that he couldn't.

Obviously, the ultimate talent has exceeded the limit of the copy talent, and unless his copy talent can be upgraded again, he will not be able to copy the opponent's ultimate talent.

This ultimate creature ignored Ye Tian and left on its own.

It's just a rush, so there's no need to get into trouble.

If it was in its own lair and Ye Tian broke in, it would attack.

"Ultimate talent, it would be great if you could upgrade the copy talent!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, he has been wandering in the multi-dimensional territory for so many years, and he can't continue to upgrade the replication talent, maybe the future upgrade of the replication talent will have to start from the dimensional sea.

For now, of course, let's go back first.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian finally succeeded in returning to the multidimensional territory.

Looking at the entire multidimensional territory from the sea of dimensions is like a mille-feuille, layer upon layer of territory.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian returned directly to the Upper Domain from the Sea of Dimensions, and then returned to the Void Heaven Palace.

Seeing Ye Tian's return, the Void Immortal Realm Lord said: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, you really succeeded in bringing back those treasures, it's amazing." "

In fact, if it weren't for Ye Tian still mastering the second ultimate dimensional killing move, he really wouldn't be able to escape.

"Void Immortal Realm Lord, the Void Heaven Palace should receive items from some special heaven and earth, and I want to exchange these things for some contribution points. Ye Tian said.

"Naturally, it's okay, you go find Lord Duomi!"

The main path of the Void Wonderland.

Ye Tian asked.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord introduced: "Lord Duomi is the Ultimate Creature created by an Ultimate Realm Lord of our Void Heaven Palace, and his strength is much stronger than ours, but he is weaker than the Ultimate Realm Lord. Lord Duomi is in charge of the contribution value of our Void Heaven Palace, as well as all of our belongings. "

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm took Ye Tian to meet the Lord Duomi.

Lady Duomi is in human form, and she looks like a beautiful woman with a bewitching body.

However, according to the introduction of the Void Immortal Realm Lord, Lord Duomi has different forms in different periods.

"I've seen Duomi-sama!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Duomi looked at Ye Tian and said, "You are very good." "

Ye Tian didn't say much, but took out some treasures that he couldn't use, most of which were snatched from the Yao Sun Heavenly Palace.

"Don't do this, you want all of this. Duomi only took part of the treasures, but gave a contribution amount: "Three million and 110,000 contribution points." "

The Void Immortal Realm Lord saw that Ye Tian had obtained so many contribution points, and she was envious.

She hasn't been able to accumulate much contribution value for a long time, and Ye Tian has earned more than three million contribution points in this wave, and there must still be a lot of treasures on her body.

She estimated that Ye Tian's harvest this time was definitely no less than five million or even more contribution points.

Subsequently.

Lord Duomi put all the 3.11 million contribution points into Ye Tian's account.

Ye Tian immediately retired, and then began to visit the Void Heaven Monument.

With so many contribution points, he was able to comprehend the Void Heaven Monument infinitely.

"The last time the Supreme Dimension Rules were trapped in one hundred and eightfold, but now that I have comprehended the two Ultimate Dimensional Killing Moves, the bottleneck does not exist, and I can continue to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules. "

Immediately.

It was here that he comprehended the rules of the highest dimension.

After a period of time, he successfully comprehended the rules of the one hundred and nine supreme dimensions.

Time flies.

Endless long years have passed.

Ye Tian had already comprehended one hundred and eighty-one supreme dimensional rules, and at this time, his progress was relatively slow, even if it was the Void Heaven Monument, it was difficult for him to quickly improve his supreme dimensional rule realm.

Other than that.

He used the two ultimate dimensional killing moves, the Tianwei Killing Move and the Heavenly Extreme Killing Move, and he had already tempered his body to the limit.

His current physical body far surpassed the other Nine Realms peak existences, and might even surpass the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

As for the soul will, now it has also broken the shackles, and it is no longer the eighteenth dimension, but the ultimate will that contains the ultimate attributes.

However, how to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord, he still didn't know very well.

He was going to exchange for a copy of the Ultimate Realm Lord's inheritance.
